content.en:
Coming here, Ye Tian was also probed by the will of many Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

However, no Blood Mutation creatures attacked them.

After all, he is also a three-time blood transformation realm, and he can freely shuttle through the shock stream.

Unlike before, his strength was too weak, and he couldn't even get rid of the shock flow, as soon as those Blood Transformation Realm creatures saw him, they knew that it was a chick who had just left the territorial waters, who would they kill if they didn't kill him?

Of course, if he left after finding something good in the ancient ruins, I am afraid that there would be many blood transformation realm creatures targeting him.

In front of the ancient ruins.

Ye Tian stood here and looked over.

At this time, the primeval ruins were filled with countless chaotic powers, and these forces caused the entire primeval ruins to turn into a special realm, frantically swallowing the energy of the outside world.

However, he couldn't penetrate the ancient ruins, and it was useless to look at them from the outside world.

"Get in!"

Ye Tian escaped into the ancient ruins.

The ancient ruins are very desolate, the kind where everything is silent.

It is also divided into countless fragments, as if endless.

Ye Tian walked among the fragments, and before he could go far, a Blood Transformation Realm creature with only half of his body left attacked him.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian directly punched it out, but the opponent's body continued to move.

At this time, he noticed that this Blood Transformation Realm creature had long since died, and its body could move, not because of the Blood Transformation Realm creature, so a special power controlled him.

"What's going on?"

Before he came, he didn't know any information about the ancient ruins, only that there was ancient gold blood here, and then he came.

Now it seems that there is something wrong with the ancient ruins!

It took him a moment to finally annihilate the shattered Blood Transformation Realm creature once and for all, but that special power was gone.

Next, he encountered a lot of broken Blood Transformation Realm creatures, whose combat power was much weaker than ordinary Blood Transformation Realm creatures, but it was difficult to kill them completely.

Thundered!!!!!

On top of the shards of a faraway land, two creatures are fighting.

One is estimated to be a giant snake in the five blood transformation realms, and the other is a demon ape in the five blood transformation realms.

However, that demon ape was also wrong, there were a large number of holes all over its body, and it was also a blood transformation realm creature controlled by that force.

Ye Tian's current strength was not enough to deal with the five Blood Transformation Realms, so he just watched the battle for a while and left directly.

At the same time, his other replicas were searching for information on the primeval ruins.

Regarding the ancient ruins, even in the White Elephant City, you can find information.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to understand the situation of the ancient ruins.

"It turns out that there have been many creatures in the Nine Blood Transformation Realm and Eight Blood Transformation Realms that have died in the Ancient Ruins, and these Blood Transformation Realm creatures are too powerful, and after they fall, the immeasurable will is immortal, and they have become countless Ancient Demon Thoughts in the special environment of the Ancient Ruins. "

Ye Tianming enlightened.

And it was the Ancient Demon Thoughts that controlled those broken Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and the Ancient Demon Thoughts of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm and Nine Blood Transformation Realms were almost impossible to erase, so even if they killed these broken Blood Transformation Realm creatures, they would not be able to solve the problem.

What's even more terrifying is that the Ancient Demon Mind manipulates the dead remnants of the creatures of the Nine Blood Transformation Realms, which is terrifying!

Of course, this situation was almost impossible to see, because at the time of the battle in the Ancient Ruins, the bodies of the nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures that died had already been taken away.

However, among the ancient ruins, there are six Blood Transformation Realm remnants, and there may be seven Blood Transformation Realm remnants.

In addition, many Blood Transformation Realm creatures are looking for treasures here, and there are also many Blood Transformation Realm creatures that have fallen here, and the shells of these Blood Transformation Realm creatures will also be occupied by the Ancient Demon Thoughts.

These Blood Transformation Realms occupied by the Ancient Demon Mind are also known as Blood Transformation Realm Demon Bodies.

Nowadays, there are not many creatures that dare to enter the primeval ruins, and most of them are squatting outside the primeval ruins, attacking the blood transformation realm creatures that come out all the time.

If you encounter a blood transformation realm creature that has been hit hard, it will be even better, and you will rush forward directly.

Along.

Ye Tian tried his best to avoid the powerful Blood Transformation Realm Demon Body and tried not to fight with them.

this day.

Ye Tian found a good thing, although it was not the primeval golden blood, it was also very valuable.

"Moyun Golden Stone, such a big piece, it should be able to sell for 30,000 white elephant gold!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Although the ancient ruins do not have any resources, the resources found are very precious, and this piece of Moyun Jinshi is enough to come to this trip in vain.

Putting away the Moyun Golden Stone, he continued to search for the Ancient Golden Blood.

As the years passed, Ye Tian encountered danger many times in the ancient ruins, and even suffered several heavy injuries, but he survived.

Later, he directly changed the copy body, and copied one more copy body to explore the path.

Finally, on this day, he found a drop of primeval golden blood.

Ancient Golden Blood is a golden substance, but there is a sense of emptiness inside, as if it contains a void world, and the aura is supreme, far from being comparable to ordinary blood.

"One drop of primeval golden blood is not enough, according to the cultivation of the primeval god and demon fist, at least one hundred drops of primeval gold blood must be prepared before you can try to cultivate the primeval god and demon fist once. "

Ye Tian felt that if he wanted to practice the Ancient God and Demon Fist, he would definitely have to try many times, not to mention a hundred drops of Ancient Golden Blood, even a thousand drops of Ancient Golden Blood would not be enough, I am afraid that tens of thousands of drops of Ancient Golden Blood would be needed.

Whether there was so much primeval gold blood in the entire primeval ruins, he didn't know.

I have to say that it is simply too difficult to practice an ancient technique!

"The position I am in now should be the outer periphery of the Ancient Ruins, there should be more Ancient Golden Blood in the inner perimeter, if you want to find a lot of Ancient Golden Blood, you must go to the Inner Perimeter of the Ancient Ruins!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian let his copy body go to the inner perimeter of the ancient ruins, and if he found the ancient golden blood, he would send it out directly.

Swish!

Ye Tian quickly escaped into the inner perimeter of the Ancient Ruins, and then carefully searched for the Ancient Golden Blood.

At first, the Ancient Golden Blood was not found, but several other resources were found, and they were also very valuable.

this day.

Ye Tian's replica body was relatively unlucky, and he encountered a six-time blood transformation realm demon body.

This is a black dragon, with only a small half of its body left, and then even so, it can exert the near-invincible combat power of five Blood Transformation Realms.

Rumble!!!

The black dragon's claws reached over, and the terrifying power directly smashed Ye Tian's body into countless pieces with one move, even if it healed, it was also annihilated in an instant.

This replica body has fallen!

Because it was a copy body, after the fall, Ye Tian directly released the copy body, resulting in nothing left, and the ancient demon thoughts could not occupy his body.
